mapper.select: SELECT A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.process_id , B.process_nm , A.comp_id , A.material , A.product , A.worker_cnt , A.use_yn , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by , A.confirm_yn , A.confirm_dt , A.write_dt , C.prcs_cnfm_id , C.rev_no , C.rev_nm , COALESCE((SELECT count(distinct prcs_work_id) FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail WHERE write_year = A.write_year AND doc_type = A.doc_type AND content is not null AND doc_no = A.doc_no),0) work_cnt , COALESCE((SELECT count(write_year) FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail WHERE write_year = A.write_year AND doc_type = A.doc_type AND doc_no = A.doc_no AND content is not null AND work_type = 'equipment'),0) equip_cnt , COALESCE((SELECT count(write_year) FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail WHERE write_year = A.write_year AND doc_type = A.doc_type AND doc_no = A.doc_no AND content is not null AND work_type = 'msds'),0) msds_cnt FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey A , esg.tb_process_info B , esg.tb_process_work_cnfm C WHERE A.comp_id = B.comp_id AND A.process_id = B.process_id AND B.use_yn = 'Y' AND C.process_id = B.process_id AND C.cnfm_yn = 'Y' AND A.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY A.use_yn desc, A.write_year desc, CAST(A.doc_no AS INTEGER) desc

SELECT A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.process_id , A.prcs_work_id , A.work_detail_id , A.work_type , A.content , A.desc1 , A.desc2 , A.use_yn , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by , B.work_content , B.ord_seq FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail A , (SELECT T1.process_id , T2.prcs_work_id , T2.work_content , T2.ord_seq FROM esg.tb_process_work_cnfm T1 , esg.tb_process_work T2 WHERE T1.prcs_cnfm_id = T2.prcs_cnfm_id) B WHERE A.process_id = B.process_id AND A.prcs_work_id = cast(B.prcs_work_id as VARCHAR) AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} ORDER BY B.ord_seq, CAST(A.prcs_work_id AS INTEGER), A.work_type, A.work_detail_id

SELECT a.ord_seq, --정렬순서 a.comp_id, --사업장ID a.process_id, --공정ID a.process_nm, --공정명 a.usage_type, --사용처(본사/도급/혼재) b.rev_no, --차수 b.rev_nm, coalesce(c.prcs_work_id,'9999') prcs_work_id, --공정작업ID c.work_content, --작업내용 c.work_desc, --작업내용설명 d.target_type work_type, --tarket타입(시스템코드) d.target_id, --tarketID(target타입의 Key값) e.std_eq_id, --stdEqId(설비ID) case when d.target_type = 'equipment' then e.std_eq_nm -- 설비일때는 설비 유형 이름 표시 else f.msds_nm end as content, -- msds 일때는 msds 이름 표시 case when d.target_type = 'equipment' then COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY c.prcs_work_id, e.std_eq_id) -- 설비일때는 설비 유형이 같은 설비의 개수 표시 else f.daily_volume end as desc1, -- msds 일때는 daily_volume 표시 case when d.target_type = 'equipment' then 0 -- 설비일때는 안쓰므로 기본값 0 else f.daily_time end as desc2 -- msds 일때는 daily_time 표시 FROM esg.tb_process_info a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm b on a.process_id = b.process_id and b.cnfm_yn = 'Y' and b.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work c on b.prcs_cnfm_id = c.prcs_cnfm_id and c.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work_map d on c.prcs_work_id = d.prcs_work_id and d.use_yn = 'Y' --LEFT JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info e on a.comp_id = e.comp_id and d.target_id = e.equipment_id and e.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tbei.*, tbdte.std_eq_nm FROM esg.tb_equipment_info tbei LEFT JOIN esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment tbdte ON tbei.comp_id = tbdte.comp_id and tbei.std_eq_id = tbdte.std_eq_id WHERE tbei.comp_id = #{compId} ) e on a.comp_id = e.comp_id and d.target_id = e.equipment_id and e.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_msds_info f on a.comp_id = f.comp_id and d.target_id = f.msds_id and f.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId} AND b.process_id = #{processId} AND a.use_yn = 'Y' --사용여부가 Y 인 공정만 ORDER BY a.ord_seq, c.prcs_cnfm_id, c.ord_seq, d.target_type, CASE WHEN d.target_type = 'equipment' THEN e.ord_seq WHEN d.target_type = 'msds' THEN f.ord_seq ELSE NULL END, d.target_id
SELECT PROCESS_NM FROM ESG.TB_PROCESS_INFO WHERE PROCESS_ID = #{processId}

SELECT A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.process_id , B.process_nm , A.comp_id , A.rev_no , A.material , A.product , A.worker_cnt , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by , C.biz_nm as biz_nm FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_info B ON A.process_id = B.process_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_company_info C ON A.comp_id = C.comp_id WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.comp_id = #{compId}

WITH work_name_table as ( SELECT T1.process_id , T2.prcs_work_id , T2.work_content FROM esg.tb_process_work_cnfm T1 , esg.tb_process_work T2 WHERE T1.prcs_cnfm_id = T2.prcs_cnfm_id ), detail_table as ( select distinct A.prcs_work_id , B.work_content from esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail A , work_name_table B where A.process_id = B.process_id and A.prcs_work_id = cast(B.prcs_work_id as VARCHAR) and A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} ), equipment_data AS ( select A.prcs_work_id , A.work_type , A.content , A.desc1 equip_cnt , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.prcs_work_id, A.work_type ORDER BY A.work_detail_id) AS new_work_detail_id FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.work_type = 'equipment' ), msds_data AS ( select A.prcs_work_id , A.work_type , A.content , A.desc1 msds_cnt , A.desc2 msds_time , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.prcs_work_id, A.work_type ORDER BY A.work_detail_id) AS new_work_detail_id FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.work_type = 'msds' ) select T1.work_content , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T2.new_work_detail_id) new_work_detail_id , 'saftey' title , T1.prcs_work_id , coalesce(T2.equip_content, '') equip_content , coalesce(T2.equip_cnt, '') equip_cnt , coalesce(T2.msds_content, '') msds_content , coalesce(T2.msds_cnt, '') msds_cnt , coalesce(T2.msds_time, '') msds_time from detail_table T1 left JOIN (select COALESCE(A.prcs_work_id, B.prcs_work_id) prcs_work_id , A.new_work_detail_id , A.content equip_content , equip_cnt , B.content msds_content , B.msds_cnt , B.msds_time from equipment_data A full outer join msds_data B on A.prcs_work_id = B.prcs_work_id and A.new_work_detail_id = B.new_work_detail_id) T2 on T1.prcs_work_id = T2.prcs_work_id order by CAST(T1.prcs_work_id AS INTEGER), T2.new_work_detail_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, process_id, comp_id, rev_no, material, product, worker_cnt, use_yn, created_at, created_by, write_dt ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, 'SAHIS', (select COALESCE(LPAD(TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(doc_no)::INTEGER + 1, '99999')), 5, '0'), '00001') from esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'SAHIS'), #{processId}, #{compId}, #{revNo}, #{material}, #{product}, #{workerCnt}, 'Y', now(), #{createdBy}, #{writeDt} ) RETURNING doc_no

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(work_detail_id, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') AS workDetailId FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, process_id, prcs_work_id, work_detail_id, work_type, content, desc1, desc2, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{processId}, #{prcsWorkId}, #{workDetailId}, #{workType}, #{content}, #{desc1}, #{desc2}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} );
mapper.select: select t1.write_year , t1.doc_type , t1.doc_no , t1.comp_id from esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey t1 where t1.confirm_yn = 'Y' and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
